author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 38951f1. (1) Windows: discovery now filters *.ripsed.lock sentinels in both walkers + regression test — root cause was #97 parallel workers overlapping a mandatory LockFileEx region with another worker's read of the sentinel-as-target; #100's exit-2-on-error unmasked it (the read failure predates this batch but was silent). (2) fuzz_engine OOM: empty find = zero-width match ON the newline byte = line-grouping walk consumes nothing = infinite Change accumulation. Empty patterns now splice-ineligible (semantically divergent anyway) + defensive no-progress guard + proptest widened {1,8}->{0,8} + reproducer as unit test + crash artifact promoted to committed seed corpus. Verified: 25 suites, 900k clean fuzz execs, original artifact passes, clippy/fmt clean. Worth savoring: the fuzz-in-CI job (#103) caught a real memory-safety-adjacent bug on its FIRST run, in code (#109) written after the job was.
